docs.title: TUI Container
docs.text: A production-ready TUI desktop environment based on Alpine Linux running in Docker with two distinct operational profiles.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• 🐧 Alpine Linux (~5MB base)
  • 🧱 Docker containers
  • 🧠 tmux terminal multiplexer
  • 🗂 ranger file manager
  • ✍ micro text editor
  • 🔐 Security (no root in KIOSK)
  • 🧪 TDD test suite

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/Dionarley/tui-container.git
cd tui-container
./build.sh
./run-dev.sh

docs.title: Documentation
docs.text:
• Quick Start - Installation guide
  • Architecture - System architecture

  • Contributing - Contribution guide

docs.title: Security Features
docs.text: Feature Implementation DEV KIOSK Non-root user dev/tui ✅ ✅ No sudo N/A ✅ ❌ Immutable Read-only config ❌ ✅ Network isolation Bridge network ✅ ✅

docs.title: Best Practices
docs.text:
• Never run as root in production
  • Use KIOSK mode for public endpoints
  • Update base images regularly
  • Scan images for vulnerabilities

docs.title: Comparison
docs.text: Feature DEV Mode KIOSK Mode User dev tui sudo ✅ Yes ❌ No apk add ✅ Yes ❌ No vim ✅ Yes ❌ No Free shell ✅ Yes ❌ No Fixed layout ❌ No ✅ Yes Auto tmux ❌ No ✅ Yes

docs.title: DEV Mode
docs.text:
Use for: - Development - Testing configurations - Installing packages - Editing files

docs.title: KIOSK Mode
docs.text:
Use for: - Production environments - Thin clients - Restricted environments

./run-kiosk.sh

docs.text: Component Description Size tui-dev Development container ~50MB tui-kiosk Production container ~45MB

docs.title: Deploy Documentation
docs.text:
File: .github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml

Trigger: Push to main when docs/** or mkdocs.yml changes

Jobs: 1. Checkout 2. Setup Python 3. Install dependencies 4. Build documentation 5. Setup Pages 6. Upload artifact 7. Deploy to GitHub Pages

docs.title: Tests
docs.text: Tests run on every push to main and canary branches.

docs.title: Dockerfile.dev
docs.text:
FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk update && apk add --no-cache \
    bash tmux ranger micro vim git curl less ncurses ca-certificates sudo

RUN addgroup -g 1000 dev && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G dev dev && \
    echo "dev ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL" >> /etc/sudoers

USER dev
WORKDIR /workspace

COPY --chown=dev:dev tmux.conf /home/dev/.tmux.conf
COPY --chown=dev:dev config /home/dev/.config

ENV TERM=xterm-256color
ENV SHELL=/bin/bash

CMD ["bash"]

docs.title: Dockerfile.kiosk
docs.text:
FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk update && apk add --no-cache \
    bash tmux ranger micro git curl less ncurses ca-certificates

RUN addgroup -g 1000 tui && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G tui tui

USER tui
WORKDIR /workspace

COPY --chown=tui:tui tmux.conf /home/tui/.tmux.conf
COPY --chown=tui:tui tmux-kiosk.conf /home/tui/.tmux-kiosk.conf
COPY --chown=tui:tui config /home/tui/.config

ENV TERM=xterm-256color
ENV SHELL=/bin/bash

CMD ["tmux", "-f", "/home/tui/.tmux-kiosk.conf"]

docs.title: Scripts
docs.text: chmod +x run-dev.sh run-kiosk.sh build.sh

docs.title: Workspace
docs.text: chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) workspace/

docs.title: Config
docs.text: chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) config/

docs.title: Verify
docs.text:
ls -la *.sh
ls -la workspace/

docs.title: DEV Configuration
docs.text:
tmux.conf:

unbind C-b
set-option -g prefix C-a
bind-key C-a send-prefix

set -g mouse on
set -g history-limit 20000
set -g status-bg black
set -g status-fg green

new-session -n shell
new-window -n files "ranger"
new-window -n editor "micro"

docs.title: KIOSK Configuration
docs.text:
tmux-kiosk.conf:

set -g mouse on
set -g status on
set -g status-position bottom
set -g status-bg black
set -g status-fg white

set -g prefix C-a
bind C-a send-prefix

unbind C-b
unbind q
unbind x
unbind d
unbind c

new-session -d -s kiosk -n TUI
split-window -h "ranger"
select-pane -t 0
split-window -v "micro"
select-layout tiled

docs.title: Build All
docs.text: ./build.sh

docs.title: Build Specific
docs.text:
# DEV only
./build.sh dev

# KIOSK only
./build.sh kiosk

docs.title: Docker Compose
docs.text:
docker compose build
docker compose build tui-dev
docker compose build tui-kiosk

docs.text:

Image tui-kiosk:latest Built

docs.text: Requirement Minimum Version Docker 20.10+ Docker Compose v2 Linux Any

docs.title: 1. Clone Repository
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/Dionarley/tui-container.git
cd tui-container

docs.title: 2. Make Scripts Executable
docs.text: chmod +x *.sh

docs.title: 3. Build Containers
docs.text: ./build.sh

docs.title: Verify Installation
docs.text:
# Run tests
bash tests/test-build.sh

# Check containers
docker images | grep tui-

docs.title: Container Access
docs.text:

HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker compose run --rm tui-kiosk
